c.d: How easy and intuitive the app interface is for users to perform photo effects and editing
Variety and uniqueness of filters and effects available for photo enhancement and artistic transformation
Availability of advanced photo editing features like selective adjustments, object removal, layering, and AI enhancements
Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, or both
Cost of the app including free, subscription, or one-time purchase
Presence of creative aids such as design templates, collage makers, stickers, text overlays for enhanced photo art creation
Use of AI to suggest edits, improve photo quality, and automate corrections
